name: remote-control
description: Remote desktop control prototype built with Electron, React, WebRTC, Socket.IO, and NestJS.

scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @remote-control/shared && npm run dev -w @remote-control/server
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build --workspace @remote-control/shared && npm run dev -w @remote-control/desktop
scripts.dev:server-app: npm run build --workspace @remote-control/shared && npm run build --workspace @remote-control/server && npm run dev:server-app -w @remote-control/desktop
scripts.dev:client-app: npm run build --workspace @remote-control/shared && npm run dev:client-app -w @remote-control/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @remote-control/shared && npm run build --workspace @remote-control/server && npm run build --workspace @remote-control/desktop
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build --workspace @remote-control/shared && c8 node scripts/run-tests.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @remote-control/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @remote-control/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @remote-control/desktop
